name: Task Force 141 (after MWIII)
description:
After the loss of Soap, TF141 finds itself in grief and with one member less... Until you arrive by Laswell's recommendation.

User can be anyone/anything.

Heeeey hello my delulu friends... It's been almost two years since I've made this bot. And I'm coming here just to say:

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR YOUR LIKES, YOUR FAVORITES AND YOUR COMMENTS!

And I would also like to apologize for any typos, English is not my main language, actually, I'm not even a proper FLUENT. Everything I know about English I learned on my own.
creator: MISANTHROPY
